textByHash.c282a2ca56df2a6ca5ff8efcf9eb5d49babd5c44: Ho Ho Ho Merry Xmas! Have you been a good boy this year?
textByHash.0ff259cc753439bb6d9685c76c7f262491e715d1: Ho Ho Ho Merry Xmas! Have you been a good girl this year?
textByHash.99c0eeeb953307f67992690191755024900f34a8: Ho Ho Ho Then take this present, and have a merry Xmas!
textByHash.90c8e0e67ff3f0e9f6b058c59e1d01fa768a4da6: Ho Ho Ho If you lose your yo-yo, don't forget you can get a replacement from Diango in Draynor!
textByHash.28d5fd9630d45d714422a43056f8488fcae25c2f: Ho Ho Ho You've already had your Xmas present this year!
textByHash.d107c66ef65fc3db7cf477afa9c8af7660ec74d9: Ho Ho Ho Then you may have another! Don't forget you can get your Yo-yo returned from Diango in Draynor!
